caption: A person's hands are shown working on a crafting project atop a white gridded cutting mat on a light-colored wooden surface. In the center of the mat is a handmade card featuring a floral pattern and a white oval sentiment that reads, "hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with best things". The logo "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene. Initially, the person's hands hover over the card, then they move to press a patterned brown and green paper strip onto the card's left side. Another similar piece of patterned paper lies nearby on the mat. Throughout the process, the person wears a white smartwatch on their left wrist. The sequence transitions from the initial placement of the hands to the physical act of pressing the decorative element onto the card.
